'''Darv Eldon''' was [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] [[Renthal's Vigilance|''Vigilance'']] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx]], during the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. A close friend and classmate of [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]], Eldon died when the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] fleet ambushed the ''Vigilance'' amongst the debris field surrounding the [[Moon/Legends|moon]].
